checks.name: sh scripts/lint-tasks.sh
checks.purpose: Validate the T9.7 execution-state sync and open-deviation structure.

checks.name: npm run check:docs
checks.purpose: Confirm the M1 documentation consistency check remains green.

checks.name: bounded entropy review searches
checks.purpose: Search for duplicate helper candidates, hidden metadata files, stale ADR references, obsolete docs, weak fixtures, golden drift markers, and unresolved deviation notes.

checks.name: node --test dist/release-gate-aggregator.test.js
checks.purpose: Verify release gate reports archive entropy_review and keep existing release gate behavior stable.

checks.name: npm run lint
checks.purpose: Run the configured source lint surface for touched TypeScript files.

checks.name: npm run test:docs
checks.purpose: Run the documented process and package-script consistency checks.

checks.name: npm test
checks.purpose: Run the full configured unit suite after the release gate aggregator change.

checks.name: git diff --check
checks.purpose: Check the patch for whitespace errors.

findings.title: macOS metadata files were present in the repository tree
findings.resolution: Removed the metadata files from the release candidate tree.
findings.residual_risk: None after removal; these files are not product inputs or release evidence.

findings.title: Release gate report did not archive the entropy review artifact
evidence: scripts/release-gate-aggregator.mjs artifact inputs lacked entropy_review before this task
findings.resolution: Added entropy_review as a required archived artifact sourced from reports/t9.7/entropy-review.json.
findings.residual_risk: Release gates still require the ordinary T9.6 evidence set before a passing release verdict can be produced.

reviewed_no_action.reason: Repeated helper names are test-local or script-local and do not create shared hidden behavior.
Accepted ADR files match the register; ADR-0009 remains an explicitly reserved M10 slot, not a stale accepted reference.
The corpus contains 107 manifests and 28 stdout goldens; release gate checks cover stale fixture and golden records, and no unclassified golden drift marker was found.
docs/tasks.md records no blocked tasks and no open deviations.

release_candidate_review_set.release_verdict_reference: scripts/release-gate-aggregator.mjs archives entropy_review into reports/t9.6/artifacts/entropy-review.json and lists it in release-report.json and release-report.md.
